headline: Banks Win More Business as Private Debt Shrinks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- For many US companies, the hot new type of credit seems to be getting less attractive. headline: Uber-Backed Lime Files For IPO After 29% Revenue Growth In FY25
summary: Lime, backed by Uber Technologies, filed for a U.S. IPO after reporting strong revenue growth and plans to list on Nasdaq under the ticker LIME.
